This snapshot DOES NOT match the on-disk TEST_INVENTORY.yaml v5.0.0 and DOES NOT match the approved TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md (which specifies FR-01=Task Model and Persistence, NFR-02=8 per-char entries TC-NFR02-02a..g, etc.).
